name: Above & Beyond
description:
'''Above & Beyond''' are an [[electronic music]] group consisting of English musicians/DJs [[Jono Grant (DJ)|Jono Grant]], [[Tony McGuinness (English musician)|Tony McGuinness]] and Finnish musician/DJ [[Paavo Siljamäki]]. Formed in 2000, they have released five studio albums, and have been consistently ranked among ''[[DJ Magazine]]'s'' Top 100 DJs Poll. Two of their singles have been nominated for [[Grammy Awards]]: "We're All We Need" ([[58th Annual Grammy Awards|58th]]) and "Northern Soul" ([[61st Annual Grammy Awards|61st]]).

They are also the owners of London-based [[electronic dance music]] labels [[Anjunabeats]], Anjunadeep, and Anjunachill, and host a weekly radio show, ''Group Therapy Radio''.
